content:
💡 whisperX | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide highly accurate, fast, and detailed speech-to-text transcriptions with precise word-level timing and speaker identification for audio and video content.
✨ Key Features: • 70x realtime transcription using faster-whisper • Accurate word-level timestamps via wav2vec2 alignment • Multispeaker ASR with speaker diarization from pyannote-audio
📖 Summary: WhisperX is a Python-based Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) system that enhances OpenAI's Whisper model by providing accurate word-level timestamps and speaker diarization. It leverages faster-whisper for efficient inference, wav2vec2 for alignment, and pyannote-audio for speaker identification, enabling fast, multi-speaker transcription with improved accuracy.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
